title: Beishi: History of the Northern Dynasties, Selection 8
description: From Beishi: History of the Northern Dynasties: chapter 8
introduction: From Beishi: History of the Northern Dynasties: chapter 8

translation.text: From Beishi: History of the Northern Dynasties: A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
